title: Add text input box next to speak button
description: Add a text input box in the main UI and position the speak button adjacent to it. Transcribed speech must be appended/inserted into this text box instead of being automatically submitted to the agent, allowing the user to review, edit, or append additional spoken/typed text before manually sending it.
result: Added glassmorphic text input box et_message and Send button btn_send next to speak button in bottom bar, communicating with service via ACTION_SEND_PROMPT intent.
